title: Agent Created Aids
goal: This is direct dogfooding evidence from recent lanes: the package has agent-aid storage, local integration areas, agent-efficiency latitude, and COMPACT_RUN, but agents still tolerate repeated friction instead of creating aids.
non_goals: Leave adjacent backlog or follow-on work out of this plan.

intent_continuity.larger intended outcome: This is direct dogfooding evidence from recent lanes: the package has agent-aid storage, local integration areas, agent-efficiency latitude, and COMPACT_RUN, but agents still tolerate repeated friction instead of creating aids.

iterative_follow_through.what this slice enabled: Agents now get compact permission and routing guidance to create bounded aids, including local-only versus checked-in storage decisions and a concrete compact runner pattern.
iterative_follow_through.discovered implications: Dogfooding showed the compact runner needed its own timeout so long commands are not killed by the outer tool before compact evidence and logs are written.
iterative_follow_through.next likely slice: none; the promoted item is complete

validation_commands: uv run pytest tests/test_workspace_cli.py -q -k "agent_aid_storage or agent_aids"
uv run ruff check src tests scripts/check/run_compact_command.py

uv run agentic-workspace proof --changed src/agentic_workspace/cli.py src/agentic_workspace/reporting_support.py scripts/check/run_compact_command.py tests/test_workspace_cli.py tests/test_compact_command_runner.py .agentic-workspace/docs/agent-aids-storage.md --format json

completion_criteria: Make it explicit that agents may create scripts, runbooks, templates, prompts, check wrappers, compact command runners, and other bounded helpers when they reduce repeated work, parsing cost, handoff cost, or error risk.

execution_run.what happened: Exposed a machine-readable agent-created-aid affordance through defaults/report surfaces, compacted the agent_aids report section to avoid duplicating the full storage payload, documented local-only versus checked-in candidate guidance, and strengthened the compact command runner with an internal timeout.
execution_run.scope touched: agent-aid storage/report payloads, compact report shaping, compact command runner, docs, tests, active planning state
execution_run.validations run: uv run pytest tests/test_compact_command_runner.py -q; uv run pytest tests/test_workspace_cli.py -q -k "agent_aid_storage or agent_aids"; uv run pytest tests -q; uv run ruff check src tests scripts/check/run_compact_command.py; make agent-aids; make maintainer-surfaces; uv run python scripts/check/check_planning_surfaces.py; uv run agentic-workspace reconcile --format json; uv run agentic-workspace proof --changed src/agentic_workspace/cli.py src/agentic_workspace/reporting_support.py scripts/check/run_compact_command.py tests/test_workspace_cli.py tests/test_compact_command_runner.py .agentic-workspace/docs/agent-aids-storage.md --format json; uv run agentic-workspace defaults --section root_cli_authority --format json

finished_run_review.intent served: yes; agents are explicitly encouraged to create bounded aids and get concrete storage and timeout guidance
finished_run_review.config compliance: yes; self-optimization evidence was evaluated and an actionable finding was folded into the lane

proof_report.validation proof: Focused tests, full tests, ruff, agent-aid check, maintainer surfaces, planning surfaces, reconcile, proof selection, and root CLI authority passed.
proof_report.evidence for \"proof achieved\" state: All validation_commands passed; proof selected workspace_cli and cli_authority lanes, and their required commands were satisfied.

intent_satisfaction.original intent: This is direct dogfooding evidence from recent lanes: the package has agent-aid storage, local integration areas, agent-efficiency latitude, and COMPACT_RUN, but agents still tolerate repeated friction instead of creating aids.
intent_satisfaction.evidence of intent satisfaction: defaults/report now expose creation triggers, aid types, storage decisions, authority boundaries, evidence shape, and the COMPACT_RUN pattern; docs mirror the behavior; tests cover the emitted contract.

execution_summary.outcome delivered: Agent-created aids are now an explicit workflow affordance with local-only versus checked-in routing and compact command-runner guidance.
execution_summary.post-work posterity capture: docs and compact defaults/report outputs updated

durable_residue.learned constraint: Reusable aids should be created when they reduce repeated work, parsing cost, handoff cost, or error risk, but local-only and checked-in candidates need different authority boundaries.
durable_residue.motivation worth preserving: Agents repeatedly tolerated command repetition and noisy output despite existing storage surfaces; the package must surface permission and concrete first patterns.
durable_residue.promotion trigger: already promoted to docs and compact defaults/report outputs in this lane

closure_check.why this decision is honest: The promoted item asked for encouragement and routing for agent-created aids; the compact surfaces, docs, and tests now provide that, and the directly discovered compact-runner timeout friction was fixed in the same lane.
closure_check.reopen trigger: Agents still fail to create aids for repeated friction because the compact surfaces are not discoverable enough.

improvement_signal_review.guidance: At closeout, separate acted-on, reported-only/routed, and dismissed incidental findings; keep this compact and evidence-backed.
signals found: Compact command runner lacked an internal timeout, so an outer tool timeout could kill the runner before it emitted compact failure evidence or wrote a log.
Agent-created aid guidance needed to distinguish repo-portable aids from local/runtime-specific aids.
signals fixed: Added --timeout-seconds to scripts/check/run_compact_command.py with timeout output, logging, and command-tree termination.
Added checked-in versus local-only guidance to the creation affordance and docs.

discard.summary: One-off command outputs and scratch timeout logs are execution evidence only.

docs.summary: Agent-created aid creation and local-vs-checked-in routing guidance is now documented.

drift_log: 2026-04-30: Promoted from TODO direct-task shape into an execplan.
